qualifications.name: MBChB
notes: Aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.
Career opportunities: Independent Medical Practitioner after two-year internship and one year of community service; Registration with the Health Professions Council of South Africa.
Admission score type: Aggregated average.
Faculty aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.
Professional accreditation: Health Professions Council of South Africa; South African Nursing Council.

General selection notes: All applicants must meet the minimum requirements of the programme they apply for; Current Grade 12 learners and applicants who have completed school are selected on academic merit; Registered university students are considered based on academic and non-academic merits according to programme selection guidelines; Applicants with tertiary qualifications or work experience are considered based on academic and non-academic merits according to programme selection guidelines.
Additional Stellenbosch requirements: Aggregate of at least 75% for the NSC or equivalent qualification, excluding Life Orientation.

Similar programmes: Bachelor of Occupational Therapy; BSc in Physiotherapy; BSc in Human Life Sciences.
Career opportunities: After one year of community service, registration with the HPCSA as a Speech-Language Therapist.
Admission score type: Aggregated average.
Faculty aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.
Professional accreditation: Health Professions Council of South Africa; South African Nursing Council.

General selection notes: All applicants must meet the minimum requirements of the programme they apply for; Current Grade 12 learners and applicants who have completed school are selected on academic merit; Registered university students are considered based on academic and non-academic merits according to programme selection guidelines; Applicants with tertiary qualifications or work experience are considered based on academic and non-academic merits according to programme selection guidelines.

Additional Stellenbosch requirements: Aggregate of at least 60% for the NSC or equivalent qualification, excluding Life Orientation; At least two of the following three languages, Home Language or First Additional Language, at 60%: English, Afrikaans, or a third South African language.
